tasks.label: CMake Config [Debug]
tasks.command: export CXXFLAGS="-stdlib=libc++" && export LDFLAGS="-stdlib=libc++" && source .venv/bin/activate && cmake -GNinja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=/usr/bin/clang-19 -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=/usr/bin/clang++-19 -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=build/Debug/generators/conan_toolchain.cmake -S/home/stefano/Workspace/cpp_code_analysis -B/home/stefano/Workspace/cpp_code_analysis/build/Debug --no-warn-unused-cli /home/stefano/Workspace/cpp_code_analysis/build/Debug
